zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth de Joigny於1100年出生在法國崔洛易特庫尼時，她的父親Renaud de Joigny40歲，母親Vaindemonde de Courtenay35歲。她與Ithier de Toucy III結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1182年在法國布格-福朗-可特艾喬尼享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth de Joigny于1100年出生在法国崔洛易特庫尼时，她的父亲Renaud de Joigny40岁，母亲Vaindemonde de Courtenay35岁。她与Ithier de Toucy III结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1182年在法国布格-福朗-可特艾喬尼享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth de Joigny was born in 1100, in Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, France, her father, Renaud de Joigny, was 40 and her mother, Vaindemonde de Courtenay, was 35. She married Ithier de Toucy III. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1182, in Joigny, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth de Joigny est née en 1100, à Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, France, son père, Renaud de Joigny, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Vaindemonde de Courtenay, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Ithier de Toucy III. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1182, à Joigny, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth de Joigny 1100 in Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Renaud de Joigny 40 und ihre Mutter Vaindemonde de Courtenay 35. Sie hat Ithier de Toucy III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1182 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Joigny, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth de Joigny è nata il nel 1100 nel Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, Francia, sua padre, Renaud de Joigny, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Vaindemonde de Courtenay, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Ithier de Toucy III. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1182, nel Joigny, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth de Joignyが1100年にフランスセントアロイアーエトコウルテナイで生まれた時，父Renaud de Joignyは40歳，母Vaindemonde de Courtenayは35歳であった。Ithier de Toucy IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1182年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeイオンジョイグニーで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth de Joigny(이)가 1100년 프랑스 세트르 로이렛 쿠르텐아이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Renaud de Joigny(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Vaindemonde de Courtenay(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 Ithier de Toucy III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1182년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 욘 조익니에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth de Joigny nasceu em 1100, em Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, França, seu pai, Renaud de Joigny, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Vaindemonde de Courtenay, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Ithier de Toucy III. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1182, em Joigny, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth de Joigny родилась в 1100 г. в местности коуртенеи, лоирет, кентр, Франция, её отцу по имени Renaud de Joigny было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Vaindemonde de Courtenay, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ithier de Toucy III. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1182 г. в местности джоигни, енн, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth de Joigny nació en 1100, en Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, Francia, su papá, Renaud de Joigny, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Vaindemonde de Courtenay, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Ithier de Toucy III. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1182, en Joigny, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, a la edad de 82 años.
